canonical_definition: The ability of a model to engage in natural, low-latency conversation, including handling interruptions and responding simultaneously.

definitions.text: The latent ability of a model to engage in simultaneous bidirectional communication, handling overlapping speech, interruptions, and real-time turn-taking as in natural human conversation.
